data.title: Charlie Munger Gave His No. 1 Tip For A Long and Happy Life — 'Avoid Crazy at All Costs' But Watch Out, 'Crazy Is Way More Common Than You Think'
Retail Stocks Rally On Tariff Pause: What's Going On?
data.description: Retail stocks such as Capri Holdings and Ralph Lauren Corporation are up Wednesday after President Donald Trump announced a 90-day suspension on reciprocal tariffs for countries that have not retaliated against the U.S., easing trade tensions for import-heavy sectors.

data.title: Venus Concept Shares Tripled On Wednesday: Here's What Happened
data.description: Venus Concept Inc. (NASDAQ: VERO) shares traded higher on Wednesday after the company secured $23.24 million in bridge financing from Madryn Health Partners.

data.title: Bullish Sentiment Across The Cannabis Space - Check Full Movers For April 9, 2025
Trump Tariffs Are Pressuring Bitcoin, Bonds, Commodities, VanEck Warns
data.description: Portfolio managers at global asset manager VanEck say the Trump administration's sweeping new tariff regime is exerting widespread pressure across asset classes, with tangible impacts already visible in digital assets, commodities, emerging markets and fixed income.
